axis_insights.best_algorithm: dqn (0.02) - but PPO+GRU reached level 9 in separate benchmarks

history.change: Fix 3 critical bugs in explorer_train.py that wasted ~70% of experiments
bugs_fixed: DQN experiments loading PPO checkpoints -> instant 'policy_net' KeyError (fixed find_checkpoints to be algorithm-aware)
PPO experiments crashing with 'NoneType has no attribute get' (fixed error handling in _run_ppo and _parse_ppo_results)
Explorer crash at end: ExperimentSpec() missing experiment_id (fixed with default value)
history.best_experiment: exp_informed_b1eb03: sparse reward, [128,64], challenge_only, epsilon_high, aggressive_important, from_scratch
history.expected_impact: 3x more experiments actually run, enabling faster convergence to better configs

changes_made.description: Fix 3 critical bugs: algorithm-aware checkpoint loading, PPO error handling, ExperimentSpec crash
changes_made.impact: ~70% of experiments were failing instantly due to these bugs

known_bottlenecks: State representation missing enemy_fire_rate, kamikaze_timing, bounce_urgency (7 features)
Reward function: survival bonus only 0.01*level, level-complete bonus linear not exponential
Level input capped at 10 in Python state (can't distinguish L10-L15)
DQN can't track temporal patterns - PPO+GRU already reached L9 vs DQN L4
Enemy proximity danger caps at level 8 (.min(9) in Rust)
Missile interception reward too low (0.5) vs wall damage penalty (2.0)
Explorer best configs cluster: sparse/aggressive reward + small nets [128,64] + challenge_only curriculum + epsilon_high + from_scratch
